productDisplayName: Crocs Kids Girl's Casual Blue Sandals
description: Designed for little girls with ample style and comfort, the crocs Mary Janes are an absolute must-have for your little princess. While her tiny feet peep through the translucent upper, the acupressure footbed massages her tired feet when she is busy indulging in messy fun with her friends. Pair this footwear with stylish cute outfits and see her glow in happy comfort.UpperSuper soft translucent TPU upper with rounded peep toe and stylish trim offering a comfortable, stylish look.Slip-on silhouette with a mock midfoot strap TPU interior provides an easy, snug FitMidsoleEVA footbed with multi-directional grooves and lines in the silhouette of the foot for ergonomic comfort and acupressureCrocs branding on mid-heel for comfort and styleFungus, bacteria and odour resistant for a healthy wear even in wet conditionsOutsoleNon-marking outsole delivers excellent traction on a variety of surfacesMulti-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfortshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
